pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.5.7 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime failures or incompatibility with modern libraries requiring Jakarta EE.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime if the source/target version is not updated to match the JDK 21 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.validation-api dependency to replace javax.validation-api.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using validation annotations will fail to compile or run if the Jakarta namespace API is not present, as javax.validation is no longer included in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x (which relies on Jakarta EE 9+), causing a compilation error due to missing class.

src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.
